description: Ambar by Jesus Del Pozo for women comes in an orange flacon with a branded charm hanging off its neck is brown twine. Ambar opens with bergamot, mandarin and cardamom. with a heart of iris flower, green tea and peony. The base notes are amber, cedar wood and sage.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
